text:
The paper is real and well-documented. The title matches exactly, but the cited authors (Hafner, Lillicrap, Norouzi, Ba) are completely wrong. 
The real authors, as confirmed by the official GitHub repository's BibTeX entry, are: Hafner, Danijar; Lillicrap, Timothy; Fischer, Ian; Villegas, Ruben; Ha, David; Lee, Honglak; and Davidson, James.
 
The paper was published in the Proceedings of the 36th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), not ICLR.
 The cited authors (Norouzi and Ba) do not appear among the real authors at all — they are authors of the related *Dreamer* paper, not PlaNet, indicating a classic author-grafting hallucination.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is real (ICML 2019, arXiv 1811.04551), but the cited authors (Hafner, Lillicrap, Norouzi, Ba) are entirely fabricated for this reference — the actual authors are Hafner, Lillicrap, Fischer, Villegas, Ha, Lee, and Davidson. Norouzi and Ba appear to have been grafted from a different Hafner paper (Dreamer). The venue is also wrong (ICLR cited vs. ICML actual).
LINK: https://proceedings.mlr.press/v97/hafner19a/hafner19a.pdf
FOUND_TITLE: Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels
FOUND_AUTHORS: Danijar Hafner, Timothy Lillicrap, Ian Fischer, Ruben Villegas, David Ha, Honglak Lee, James Davidson
FOUND_YEAR: 2019
VERDICT: LIKELY
